tweets.translated: Grok 4.5 现已在所有平台上推出

tweets.content: Sad to see BitMex go. Some thoughts: BitMex pioneered 100x perps in crypto back in 2014. Delivery futures existed before then, making Fridays hectic. BTC deposits only, one chain only, withdrawals only once per day, through a multi-sig wallet. The constraints that seemed inconvenient kept them unhacked. All four founders pled guilty to BSA violations a month before trial, after 18 months of fighting it. $10m fine each, home confinement. No one went to prison. However, their business didn’t survive the “war on crypto” from the Biden admin. Lastly, wind down appears orderly, users can withdrawals their assets. Respect to @CryptoHayes 🫡
tweets.translated: 很遗憾看到 BitMex 消失。一些想法：BitMex 早在 2014 年就在加密领域率先推出了 100 倍的永续收益。在此之前就存在交割期货，这使得周五变得忙碌。仅限 BTC 存款，仅限一条链，每天只能通过多重签名钱包提款一次。看似不便的限制使他们无法受到攻击。经过 18 个月的抗争后，四位创始人在审判前一个月承认违反 BSA 行为。每人罚款 1000 万美元，居家隔离。没有人入狱。然而，他们的业务并没有在拜登政府的“加密货币战争”中幸存下来。最后，清算有序进行，用户可以提取资产。尊重@CryptoHayes 🫡

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: .@Binance is becoming the liquidity hub beyond crypto. Not just for BTC or ETH, but for tokenized real-world assets, TradFi perps, stocks, gold, and 24/7 global market access. The latest DefiLlama research shows why this matters: 📊 Binance’s BTC perp liquidity within 1% of mid-price reached $536M in 2025 🌍 Tokenized RWAs grew from around $5.5B in early 2025 to $25B by mid-2026 🔥 RWA perp volume jumped from $0.23B to $347B, with CEXs holding roughly 80% of activity ⚡ Binance held 55.7% of CEX RWA perp volume and led TradFi perps with 35.9% market share The same rails that made crypto liquid are now being used to bring traditional assets into a 24/7 trading environment. This is how crypto infrastructure starts reshaping global market access.
tweets.translated: @cz_binance 转发：@Binance 正在成为超越加密货币的流动性中心。不仅适用于 BTC 或 ETH，还适用于代币化的现实世界资产、TradFi Perps、股票、黄金和 24/7 全球市场准入。最新的 DefiLlama 研究表明了这一点的重要性：📊 币安 2025 年中间价 1% 以内的 BTC 永续流动性达到 5.36 亿美元🌍 代币化 RWA 从 2025 年初的约 $5.5B 增长到 2026 年中期的 $25B 🔥 RWA 永续交易量从 $0.23B 跃升至 $347B，中心化交易所持有约 80% ⚡ 币安持有 CEX RWA Perp 交易量的 55.7%，并以 35.9% 的市场份额领先 TradFi Perp。 使加密货币具有流动性的相同轨道现在被用来将传统资产带入 24/7 交易环境。这就是加密基础设施开始重塑全球市场准入的方式。

tweets.content: I have this feeling that Lisa from $AMD likes AI. It’s cool getting to meet some of you at the event!
tweets.translated: 我有这种感觉，来自 $AMD 的 Lisa 喜欢人工智能。很高兴在活动中见到你们中的一些人！

tweets.content: $INTC and $AMD to sign CPU LTAs with Chinese customers for AI DCs (Reuters). - Prices of some CPU products have risen more than 40% in China since the start of the year from sources. - Month-on-month increases topping 10% for some products CPUs were already a bottleneck, following CPU ratios due to AI inference... But the broader trend of LTAs seems to be appearing from: - Memory, with $MU, Samsung, $SNDK, and SK Hynix signing DRAM/NAND LTAs. - Photonics, with $LITE, $COHR signing EML LTAs. And recent Trendforce reports that $AMD and hyperscalers are now pursuing CW LTAs. And I'm sure there's many more from MLCCs to all the way to substrates. +1 for the bottleneck investors... hard to be a "bubble that pops" if you have take or pay demand spanning multiple years.
tweets.translated: $INTC 和 $AMD 将与中国客户签署 AI DC 的 CPU 长期协议（路透社）。 - 从消息来源来看，今年以来中国部分CPU产品价格上涨超过40%。 - 某些产品的环比增长超过 10% CPU 已经成为瓶颈，因为 AI 推理导致 CPU 比率下降……但 LTA 的更广泛趋势似乎出现在： - 内存，$MU、三星、$SNDK 和 SK Hynix 签署了 DRAM/NAND LTA。 - 光子学，与 $LITE、$COHR 签署 EML 长期协议。最近的 Trendforce 报告称，AMD 和超大规模厂商正在寻求 CW LTA。我确信从 MLCC 到基板，还有更多的产品。对于瓶颈投资者+1...如果你有跨越多年的接受或支付需求，那么很难成为“泡沫”。

tweets.content: Just some notes from $TSLA transcripts: Elon Musk: "I think Optimus will be the biggest product ever" from Q2 earnings transcripts. Even from Q1, Elon Stated: "I think Optimus will be our biggest product. Not just Tesla's biggest product ever, but probably the biggest product ever. And I remain convinced of that conclusion". It's very rare to see such high conviction reiterated from Elon regarding humanoids both directionally and TAM-wise. In terms of upstream suppliers opportunities, Karn Budhiraj, VP of $TSLA supply chains stated: "We’re seeing the same level of investment going to memory and also new specific items like metal injection molded parts, flexible printed circuits, and all sorts of nonlinear technologies..." And that they had to build new supply chains from scratch. So would be interesting to look at for new supply chain supplier opportunities apart from the known ones. Just pulled older slides and it looks like capacity targets for Fremont are 1M and Giga Texas was 10M, so at scale, $TSLA seems to be the clear US leader. If you're looking at that S-Curve opportunity ramp. On a side note, Elon also gave a shoutout to $MU with likely reasonably priced LTAs, given his statement: "We really appreciate Micron making room for Tesla in the years to come and giving us actually a very significant allocation on reasonable terms given the pretty insane pricing of memory these days." (Just for structural memory demand). Elon also gave a shoutout to Panasonic which had invested many billions in increasing battery cell production (will need to do deeper DD into Panasonic after this), then Samsung and $TSM. Just takeaways from Tesla earnings TLDR: Elon tends to be directionally correct on where the future is heading, such as with EV or Space. He seems extremely bullish on humanoids.
tweets.translated: 只是来自 TSLA 成绩单的一些注释：埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）：从第二季度收益成绩单来看，“我认为 Optimus 将成为有史以来最大的产品”。即使从第一季度开始，埃隆就表示：“我认为 Optimus 将是我们最大的产品。不仅是特斯拉有史以来最大的产品，而且可能是有史以来最大的产品。我仍然相信这个结论”。很少看到 Elon 在方向性和 TAM 方面重申对人形机器人如此坚定的信念。在上游供应商机会方面，TSLA供应链副总裁Karn Budhiraj表示：“我们看到同样水平的投资流向存储器以及新的特定项目，如金属注塑零件、柔性印刷电路和各种非线性技术......”并且他们必须从头开始建立新的供应链。因此，除了已知的供应链供应商机会之外，寻找新的供应链供应商机会将会很有趣。刚刚拉出旧幻灯片，看起来弗里蒙特的产能目标是 100 万，德克萨斯州的产能目标是 1000 万，因此从规模来看，TSLA 似乎是美国明显的领先者。如果你正在寻找 S 曲线机会斜坡。另一方面，Elon 还对价格可能合理的长期协议表示赞赏，他表示：“我们非常感谢美光科技在未来几年为特斯拉腾出空间，并以合理的条件为我们提供了非常重要的分配，因为现在内存的定价相当疯狂。” （仅针对结构性内存需求）。 Elon 还赞扬了松下，该公司已投资数十亿美元来增加电池产量（此后需要对松下进行更深入的 DD），然后是三星和 $TSM。特斯拉财报的要点 TLDR：埃隆对于未来的发展方向往往是正确的，例如电动汽车或太空领域。他似乎非常看好类人生物。
